## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between Neighbor and GrowthX to explore potential AI-driven content marketing collaboration.](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation services, from strategy to publishing](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=500.0)
  - [Neighbor seeks to expand organic reach, particularly for B2B host acquisition](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)
  - [Typical GrowthX engagements produce 5-15 editorial pieces/week, with initial results in 2-4 months](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=481.0)
  - [GrowthX's approach includes a 6-8 week strategy sprint followed by execution phase](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)

## Topics

### Company Backgrounds

  - [Kyle (GrowthX): VP of Customer Growth, 19 years in growth marketing](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=97.0)
  - [Reid (Neighbor): Performance marketing background, now focused on Google search/maps](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=193.0)
  - [Neighbor: Airbnb-like marketplace for storage and parking spaces](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=229.0)

### Neighbor's Current SEO Landscape

  - [30,000 dynamic landing pages (programmatic SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=278.0)
  - [Previous editorial SEO attempt: 100k visits, low conversions](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [Seeking content strategy for host-side, particularly B2B (multifamily, hospitality, retail owners)](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=352.0)
  - [Case study: Equity Residential generating millions in ancillary revenue](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Two-phase approach: Strategy Sprint (6-8 weeks) + Execution](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=751.0)
  - [Deliverables: Audience archetypes, writing guidelines, content examples](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=910.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows for rapid, high-quality content production](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)
  - [End-to-end service including content creation, images, and publishing](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=683.0)

### Content Production and Results

  - [Editorial output: 5-15 pieces/week (non-programmatic)](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)
  - [Timeline for results:](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [Month 2: Compounding impressions](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1244.0)
      - [Month 3: Notable uptick in clicks](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1248.0)
      - [Months 4-6: Enough data for confident analysis](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1259.0)

### Advanced SEO Strategies

  - [Leveraging tools like Scrunch for measurement](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1346.0)
  - [Focus on question-based content for Google's Answer Engine Optimization (AEO)](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1341.0)
  - [Custom workflow for identifying relevant questions and creating comprehensive answers](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Kyle to share presentation deck and meeting recording](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1497.0)
  - [Reid to discuss internally about potential collaboration timing](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Potential follow-up in a couple of months after Neighbor fills new hire position](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1519.0)
  - [Explore flexibility in GrowthX's typical 12-month engagement terms if needed](https://fathom.video/share/8s5nV_J2qNQgkQYe8-jEebBxFxtDhzRJ?tab=summary&timestamp=1533.0)
